The '''Eliminator 434-series assassin droid''', also known as the '''Eliminator assassin droid, model 434''', was a model of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]].

==Description==
The Eliminator 434 was a [[Class four droid/Legends|Class four]] [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]]. A biped [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] shaped [[Droid/Legends|droid]], it stood 1.8 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and was armed with a [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] and [[Concussion grenade launcher/Legends|concussion grenade launcher]].<ref name="SWS" /> It was also equipped with a [[Broadband antenna/Legends|broadband antenna]] to monitor [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] channels.<ref name="SWS2" />

==History==
The Eliminator 434 was active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="SWS" /> and the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. An Eliminator 434 was part of an [[Assassination attempt on Princess Leia Organa|assassination attempt]] on the life [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Isolder]] of [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. The droid was destroyed by [[Astarta]], Isolder's [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]].<ref name="Courtship">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Eliminator 434 and the [[Uulshos justice droid]] share a similar design as both were apparently based off of early concept art for [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88]]. The head design also appears in [[Star Wars: DroidWorks]] as the [[RBY Data Collection Scanning Head|Brodan RBY Data Collection Scanning Head]].
